titleStmt.title: SII 22.422: original edition by G.V. Srinivasa Rao
No. 422. (A.R. No. 422 of 1906) TIRUNELVELI DISTRICT, TIRUNELVELI TALUK, ŚIVALAPPĒRI. AḺAGAR TEMPLE—ON THE SOUTH AND WEST WALLS OF THE CENTRAL SHRINE RĀJARĀJA I—26th YEAR (A.D. 1016-11)

summary.p: Pieces are missing in the middle of the inscription. This begins with the usual introduction of the king (Tirumagaḷpōla etc.). It records the endowment of a land called Kuḷakkuḍikkuḷam on the north bank of the river Taṇporundam, free of all taxes, to provide for the expenses of the tiruchcheṉṉaḍai (daily procession with lights inside the prākāra of the temple) of god Karumāṇikkadēvar “who was pleased to reside” in Teṉ-Tirumāliruñjōlai, by the Mahāsabhā of Śrīvallabhamaṅgalam (Śīvalappēri) a brahmadēya in Kiḻkaḷak-kūṟṟam a division of Rājarāja-maṇḍalam.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . tirumakaḷpolap perunilaiccelviyun taṉakke Urimai pūṇṭamai maṉakkoḷak kān=taḷūrccālai kalamaṟuttaruḷi veṅkaiñāṭuṅ
kaṅkapāṭiyum nuḷampapāṭiyu n=taṭikaipāṭiyuṅ kuṭamalaināṭuṅ kollamum kaliṅkamum Eṇṭicai pukaḻtara Īḻamaṇṭalamum Iraṭṭapāṭi
Eḻarai Ilakkamum n=tiṇṭiṟalveṉṟit taṇṭāṟ koṇṭu taṉṉeḻil vaḷar Ūḻiuḷ Ellāyāṇṭu n=toḻutakai viḷaṅkum yāṇṭe ceḻiyarait te
cukoḻ śrīkovirājarāja rājakesari vaṉmmarākiya śrīrājarājadevarkku yāṇṭu 2 10 6Āvatu śrīrājarājamaṇṭalattu kiḻkaḷakkūṟṟattu brahmadeyam śrīvallabha maṅkalattu
mahāsabhaiyom peruṅkuṟi cāṟṟi nam brahmasthāṉattuk kūṭṭak kuṟaivaṟak kūṭi Iruntu nam teṉṟirumāliruñcolai niṉṟaruḷiṉa karumāṇikkadevarkkut tiruc ceṉṉaṭaikkum
tiruviḷakkukkum bhūmi Iṉṟik kiṭantamaiyilt tirucceṉṉaṭaikkum tiru viḷakkukkumāka niroṭu Aṭṭikkuṭutta pulakkuḷa—ṟṟukkiṭanta pulakkuḷam taṇporu n=tattiṉ vaṭakaraik kuḷakkuṭikkuḷam vaḷaiyilc cuṟṟumuṟṟum māḷni— m meṉokkiṉa maramuṅ kiḻṇokkiya kiṇaṟum puṟṟuñ ce
ṟṟiyum maṟṟu Ikkuḷamum Ikkuḷattil vaḷaiyilc cuṟṟumuṟṟum Epperp paṭṭitum Iṟaiyiliāka niroṭu Aṭṭikkuṭuttom māhāsa— rumāliruñcolai niṉṟaruḷiṉa karumāṇikkatevarkku Ipparicu niroṭu Aṭṭikkuṭutta Ikkuḷakkuṭik kuḷattukkuppe—lai parāṅkucamaṅkalattu Ellaikkuk kiḻakkum vaṭavellai Ammāṉku
ḷattu marampukkut teṟku kiḻellai Avvaṭimaṅkalattu Ellaikku meṟkkum teṉṉellai vallanāṭṭup paṉaiūr nattattukku vaṭakkum Iv—kellaiyuḷ naṭuvukiṭanta nilam Epporpaṭṭitum Iṟaiyili Āka niroṭu Aṭṭiṉamaiyil Ibhūmikku Iṟaiiṟukka pe—m collap peṟātomākavum Ipparicu Iccuṭṭappaṭṭa kuḷamum kuḷattiṉ ki
ḻ bhūmiyum niroṭu Aṭṭi dharmadāṉa Olai ceytukuṭuttu kuṟukkainakkaṉ vāsutevaṉār paṇikka makaitirai nārāyaṇapaṭṭac comāciyā—ttu viṣṇukkirama vittar paṇikka Ātaṉūr nārāyaṇaṅ kecuvapaṭṭar paṇikka paṇiyiṉālp paṇiccum dhanmadāṉa Olai— mahāsabhaiyom mahāsabhaiyār paṇikka Ivvolai Eḻutiṉe
ṉ Ivvūr sabhaikkaraṇattāṉ maṅkalavaṉ naṭuvunilai Āyiṉa Iraṇṭāyirat taiṉūṟṟuva maṅkalātittaṉ Eḻuttu ...
Digital edition of SII 22.422 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
